results.cypher:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:LEADS {role: '회장'}]->(c:Company {name_ko: 'SK하이닉스'})
RETURN p.name_ko AS name, p.role AS role

MATCH (p:Person {name_ko: '이재용'})-[:LEADS]->(c:Company)
RETURN p.name_ko AS person, c.name_ko AS company, c.corp_code AS corp_code, c.ticker AS ticker, c.sector AS sector
LIMIT 25

MATCH (supplier:Company)-[:SUPPLIES]->(customer:Company)
WHERE customer.name_ko = 'SK하이닉스'
RETURN supplier.corp_code, supplier.ticker, supplier.name_ko, supplier.sector, supplier.market
LIMIT 25

MATCH (supplier:Company)-[:SUPPLIES]->(samsung:Company {name_ko: '삼성전자'})
WHERE supplier.market IS NOT NULL
RETURN supplier.corp_code, supplier.ticker, supplier.name_ko, supplier.sector, supplier.market
LIMIT 25

MATCH (supplier:Company)-[:SUPPLIES]->(customer:Company)
WHERE toLower(supplier.sector) CONTAINS 'hbm'
   OR toLower(customer.sector) CONTAINS 'hbm'
   OR toLower(supplier.name_ko) CONTAINS 'hbm'
   OR toLower(customer.name_ko) CONTAINS 'hbm'
RETURN DISTINCT supplier.name_ko AS supplier_name, supplier.sector AS supplier_sector,
       customer.name_ko AS customer_name, customer.sector AS customer_sector
LIMIT 25

MATCH (c:Company {name_ko: '삼성전자'})-[:COMPETES_WITH]-(rival:Company)
WHERE rival.sector CONTAINS '메모리' OR c.sector CONTAINS '메모리'
RETURN rival.name_ko, rival.sector, rival.market
LIMIT 25

MATCH (c:Company)
WHERE c.sector CONTAINS '반도체' AND c.market IN ['KOSPI', 'KOSDAQ']
RETURN c.corp_code, c.ticker, c.name_ko, c.sector, c.market
LIMIT 25
